sentences.arabic: عَاشَ مَلِكٌ كَرِيمٌ فِي هَذِهِ الْمَدِينَةِ مِنْذُ زَمَنٍ بَعِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Jedan plemeniti kralj živio je u ovom gradu davno.
sentences.translationEn: A generous king lived in this city long ago.

sentences.translation: Volio je ljude i brinuo se o njima.
sentences.translationEn: He loved the people and cared for them.

sentences.translation: Kralj je izgradio veliku školu za djecu.
sentences.translationEn: The king built a large school for the children.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَ النَّاسُ هَذَا الْمَلِكَ لِسَنَوَاتٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su pamtili ovog kralja dugim godinama.
sentences.translationEn: The people remembered this king for many long years.
